sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3723" key="a)ktere/i+stos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκτερ-έϊστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3723.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unhallowed by funeral rites,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.564</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
